title: RebootController Method, Spel Class
parameters: ShowStatusDialog	Boolean expresstion that specifies whether to show a status dialog or not.
notes: Use ShowStatusDialog to show a dialog with a progress bar.  You can abort the operation from the status dialog or by executing the Abort method.
see_also:
Abort

RebootController Example

VB Example:

m_spel.RebootController(True)

C# Example:

m_spel.RebootController(true);
